name: Gentle Embrace
description: A silvery-white stone statue often seen around Hiisi Island in Nod-Krai. This statue evokes a warm, fuzzy feeling, as if it's about to embrace anyone who approaches.\n"O lost child, in the name of the descendants of the Far North, I pray for the blessing of light. May the Frost Moon's grace still the wild winds of the cold night and bring warmth to the young birds huddled on the frozen earth."\nPerhaps it was the craftsman's wish to ward off disease and spare all from suffering that inspired this comforting symbolism.
